/opt/android-sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/bin/clang++ --target=armv7-none-linux-androideabi23 --sysroot=/opt/android-sdk/ndk/28.2.13676358/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/linux-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -march=armv7-a -mthumb -Wformat -Werror=format-security   -fno-limit-debug-info  -shared -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,d050.multiplayeredit.android32.so -o d050.multiplayeredit.android32.so CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/ActionSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/EditorHooks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/NetworkManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/RemoteActionHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/SessionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/ui/CursorNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/ui/MultiplayerPopup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/ui/PlayerListNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/src/ui/SessionStatusNode.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/MultiplayerEdit.dir/geode-main/entry.cpp.o"   -L"/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/geode-main/loader/include/link"  -L"/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/geode-main/loader/include/link/android32"  _deps/ixwebsocket-build/libixwebsocket.a _deps/mbedtls-build/library/libmbedtls.a _deps/mbedtls-build/library/libmbedx509.a _deps/mbedtls-build/library/libmbedcrypto.a -pthread -lc -lunwind -lcocos2dcpp -lfmod -lGLESv2 -llog bindings/libGeodeBindings.a _deps/arc-build/libarc.a _deps/asp2-build/libasp.a _deps/fmt-build/libfmtd.a "/home/d050/Coding/Me Coding/MultiplayerEdit/geode-main/bin/5.7.1/Geode.android32.so" -latomic -lm
